en: John Mann. Yo! Oh, what's going on with the hat?
Oh, new year, new me. Might be a hat guy now. Just a little tight on your head. Huh?
It's, like, pulling your eyebrows up. It's 2022, and I just, I don't know, want to try out a new personality.
You want to change your whole personality? Exactly. Like, I'm kind of sick of being the pathetic loser I was last year.
Oh, that's sad. Do you mind if I try some new personalities for you guys? Sure.
ko: 새 성격 좀 시도해봐도 돼? 그래.

en: What about if I was one of those guys who's, like, hey, yo, your vibe is flames.
ko: 만약 내가 이런 부류면? "야, 너 분위기 불이야!"

en: Oh. What? I don't love that. Hey, girl, you want me to take you to Benihana's,
and maybe you'd take your bottoms off? Oh, just the bottoms? What?
And then we'd go see a fantasy movie. No, this guy sucks.
ko: 그리고 판타지 영화 보러 가는 거야. 안 돼, 이 캐릭터 최악이야!

en: You want this to be your new personality? Put your tongue back in, man.
Not with your finger. Not like that, dude. I don't understand this, man. Of course you don't get it.
ko: 이해가 안 돼. 당연히 이해 못 하지.

en: Because you guys have great personalities. You're tall.
That's all? It doesn't have to be a hat guy, but I have to be somebody new.
ko: 모자 쓰는 남자일 필요는 없는데, 새로운 사람이 돼야 해. 세상에.

en: Oh, my God. What about if I was one of those guys who's, like, my research!
Years of my research! It's been destroyed!
I'll never find the cure again!
What are you doing, man? This is your personality? Yeah, just one of those dudes whose years of research got rocked.
Honestly, I'm starting to get it. Pardon? Like, I feel like I need a new personality.
What are you talking about? I would just feel more confident being one of those guys who's just, like, Mr. Potter.
ko: 이런 남자가 되면 더 자신감이 생길 것 같아—

en: That's snake poop? I just mean one of those guys who's, like, I teach potions at Hogwarts.
That's from Harry Potter. The English movie? What is going on?
Dude, come on. Find a new personality with us. Like, you can't be happy as is.
Is this working for you, being this way?
Honestly, no. See? Okay, maybe I could go up to a girl at a bar and be like,
I'm gonna get y'all started with sweet teas.
ko: 좋아, 바에서 여자한테 다가가서 "스위트 티부터 갖다 드릴게요" 하면 어때?

en: I would be worried that she would think that you're her waitress.
ko: 걔가 널 웨이트리스로 생각할까 봐 걱정이야.

en: I'm saying a guy who's like, ooh, somebody was hungry.
ko: 내 말은 "어머, 누가 배고팠나 봐!" 이런 남자.

en: Let me clear that plate out for y'all. Kind of like a southern waitress.
Oh. Yeah. Dude, what about this guy?
ko: 야, 이 캐릭터는? "안녕, 난 Paul. Jimmy Neutron에서."

en: Hi, I'm Paul. From Jimmy Neutron. I'm gonna walk up to the hottest girl in the club
ko: "클럽에서 가장 예쁜 여자한테 다가가서 '문이 닫힙니다, 물러나 주세요' 할 거야."

en: and just be like, stand clear of the closing doors, please.
ko: "클럽에서 가장 예쁜 여자한테 다가가서 '문이 닫힙니다, 물러나 주세요' 할 거야."

en: The subway guy! We're killing it!
What about a guy who's like, party time!
ko: "파티 타임! 어-허. 어-허. 우 와. 우 와." 이런 남자는?

en: Uh-huh! Uh-huh! Ooh-wah! Ooh-wah! Ooh-wah!
Maybe we should just be ourselves. All right, I'll catch you guys.
One more second.
